---
title: "Jedidiah Harwood"
image: profile-pic.png
about: 
  template: broadside
  image-width: 10cm
  image-shape: round
  links: 
    - icon: envelope
      text: jedharwood [å] ucdavis [dot] edu
---

Hello, and welcome to my website!

# About Me

I am a Ph. D. Student in the Department of Statistics, at the University of California, Davis. Prior to my time at Davis, I completed my Bachelors degree in statistics, at the California State University, East Bay. During my time at CSUEB, I was a research assistant under Prof. Eric Suess.

# Interests

I am interested in Statistical Machine Learning, Bayesian Inference, and High-Dimensional Problems.

#
